title: NeuraDock Visual Cognitive Load Agent Tutorial: A Quality-Gated Open-Source EEG Workflow for Alpha Dynamics and Real-Time Applications
abstract: arXiv:2606.26518v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: This tutorial paper provides a step-by-step, reproducible walkthrough of NeuraDock Agent, an open-source EEG agent focused on Alpha dynamics and visual cognitive-load analysis. The goal is practical: a reader should be able to install the agent, run EEG preprocessing and quality control, generate Alpha dynamics figures, perform within-subject Rest/Task visual cognitive-load comparison, run the public mini-dataset analyses and compare them with the reference validation summary, start an online dashboard, call the real-time API from an external application, and use the LLM interpretation layer to explain quality risks. Existing EEG toolkits provide excellent offline analysis, but assembling a real-time, quality-gated cognitive-load pipeline often requires manually bridging acquisition, custom QC, Alpha feature extraction, and a web API; this tutorial closes that offline-to-online gap. The tutorial uses a quality-gated workflow: downstream

Title: NeuraDock Visual Cognitive Load Agent Tutorial: A Quality-Gated Open-Source EEG Workflow for Alpha Dynamics and Real-Time Applications

translated_title: NeuraDock视觉认知负荷智能体教程：面向Alpha动态与实时应用的质量门控开源脑电工作流
translated_abstract: 本教程论文提供了NeuraDock智能体的逐步、可复现的操作指南。NeuraDock是一个专注于Alpha动态和视觉认知负荷分析的开源脑电智能体。其实践目标为：读者应能安装该智能体，运行脑电预处理与质量控制，生成Alpha动态图表，进行被试内静息/任务视觉认知负荷比较，运行公开迷你数据集分析并与参考验证摘要对比，启动在线仪表板，从外部应用程序调用实时API，并使用大语言模型解释层来阐明质量风险。现有脑电工具包提供优秀的离线分析能力，但构建实时、质量门控的认知负荷流水线通常需要手动连接采集、自定义质量控制、Alpha特征提取和网页API；本教程弥合了这一离线到在线的鸿沟。教程采用质量门控工作流：下游分析
tldr: 本教程通过开源NeuraDock智能体，提供了一套从安装到实时API调用的完整、质量门控的脑电工作流，弥合了离线分析与在线应用之间的鸿沟。
en_tdlr: This tutorial provides a complete, quality-gated EEG workflow from installation to real-time API calls using the open-source NeuraDock agent, bridging the gap between offline analysis and online applications.
